M0570_WHEN_CONFUSD (M0570) When Confused When confused (reported or observed). 00 = Never 
01 = In new or complex situations only
02 = On awakening or at night only
03 = During the day and evening, but not constantly
04 = Constantly
NA = NA - Patient nonresponsive. CHAR 2 x x
